## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Security improvement

## Pillar

- [ ] Q — Quality (benchmarks / evaluation)
- [ ] A — Autonomy (privacy / export / providers)
- [ ] P — Product (answer / hooks / viewer / IDE)
- [ ] Lab — KG / conflict / confidence / regex
- [ ] GTM
- [ ] Operational / CI / infra / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (see CONVENTIONS.md)
- [ ] I have added tests covering my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] Ranking/scoring changes go through shadow-mode per CLAUDE.md regra #5
- [ ] Schema changes are additive + migration provided + rollback SQL included
- [ ] No secrets / keys / passphrases / PII included in this PR
- [ ] Backward-compatible OR breaking change explicitly documented in PR body
- [ ] MANDATORY CLOSURE STEPS executed if this PR was created by an agent
